arts.ttl: Bookies new predicted Championship table as Portsmouth’s chances of survival rated v QPR, Cardiff and Hull City
arts.sum: Portsmouth sit bottom of the table with two games in hand after their recent postponements

arts.ttl: LATEST: News on Portsmouth move for Leeds United striker with Rangers, Stoke City & Co on trail
arts.sum: John Mousinho has ruled out a move for Leeds United striker Joe Gelhardt.

arts.ttl: Encouraging news at last for luckless Portsmouth title winner and ex-Wrexham target after wretched 2024
arts.sum: Light at the end of the tunnel and a farewell to a wretched 2024 is finally within sight for one luckless Pompey title-winner.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss provides worrying injury update on Kusini Yengi ahead of Swansea game
arts.sum: Pompey are awaiting the results of a scan to know the full extent of Kusini Yengi’s latest injury.
